title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal direct risk, but if improperly configured or used without proper validation, it could expose sensitive dependency data or provide inaccurate patch recommendations. Additionally, malicious actors could potentially exploit its popularity by distributing modified or malicious versions.
recommended_actions: Verify the authenticity and integrity of the tool before downloading or using it by checking its source repository and digital signatures.
Test the tool in a controlled environment before deploying it in production to ensure it functions as expected and does not introduce additional risks.
Educate development and security teams on proper usage and validation of the tool's output to avoid reliance on potentially incorrect recommendations.

title: A writer role user in an attacker-controlled namespace could signal, delete, and reset workflows...
description: A writer role user in an attacker-controlled namespace could signal, delete, and reset workflows or activities in a victim namespace on the same cluster. Exploitation requires the attacker to know or guess specific victim workflow ID(s) and, for signal operations, signal names. This was due to a bug introduced in Temporal Server v1.29.0 which inadvertently allowed an attacker to control the namespace name value instead of using the server's own trusted name value within the batch activity code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5199.

title: Mbed TLS v3.3.0 up to 3.6.5 and 4.0.0 allows Algorithm Downgrade.
description: Mbed TLS v3.3.0 up to 3.6.5 and 4.0.0 allows Algorithm Downgrade.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Mbed TLS allows an attacker to downgrade cryptographic algorithms, potentially forcing the use of weaker encryption. This can lead to data interception, tampering, or unauthorized access, compromising the confidentiality and integrity of sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest patched version of Mbed TLS that addresses CVE-2026-25834.
Conduct a thorough review of systems using Mbed TLS to identify and mitigate any potential exposure.
Implement strict monitoring and logging to detect any unusual activity related to cryptographic operations.

title: A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco Evolved Programmable Network...
description:
A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco Evolved Programmable Network Manager (EPNM) could allow an authenticated, remote attacker with low privileges to access sensitive information that they are not authorized to access.

This vulnerability is due to improper authorization checks on a REST API endpoint of an affected device. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by querying the affected endpoint. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to view session in

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20155.

title: A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco IMC could allow an authenticated,...
description:
A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco IMC could allow an authenticated, remote attacker with admin-level privileges to perform command injection attacks on an affected system and execute arbitrary commands as the root user.

This vulnerability is due to improper validation of user-supplied input. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by sending crafted commands to the web-based management interface of the affected software. A successful exploit could allow th

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated attacker with admin-level privileges to execute arbitrary commands as the root user, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, or disruption of services.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches provided by Cisco to address CVE-2026-20096.
Restrict access to the web-based management interface to trusted IP addresses and implement network segmentation.
Monitor system logs for any suspicious activity or unauthorized command execution.

title: An unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability exists in applications that use the...
description: An unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability exists in applications that use the Replicator node package manager (npm) version 1.0.5 to deserialize untrusted user input and execute the resulting object.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2265.

title: pandas-ai v3.0.0 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability via the pandasai.agent...
description: pandas-ai v3.0.0 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability via the pandasai.agent.base._execute_sql_query component.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in pandas-ai v3.0.0 could allow attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries, potentially leading to unauthorized data access, data manipulation, or complete database compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched version of pandas-ai if available, or apply any recommended mitigations provided by the maintainers.
Review and sanitize all user inputs passed to the pandasai.agent.base._execute_sql_query component to prevent exploitation.
Monitor logs for unusual SQL queries or database activity that could indicate an attempted or successful exploitation.

title: A vulnerability in the Metadata update feature of Cisco Nexus Dashboard Insights could allow an...
description:
A vulnerability in the Metadata update feature of Cisco Nexus Dashboard Insights could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to write arbitrary files to an affected system.

This vulnerability is due to insufficient validation of the metadata update file. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by crafting a metadata update file and manually uploading it to an affected device. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to write arbitrary files to the underlying operating system as the&

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20174.

title: A vulnerability in Cisco Smart Software Manager On-Prem (SSM On-Prem) could allow an...
description:
A vulnerability in Cisco Smart Software Manager On-Prem (SSM On-Prem) could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the underlying operating system of an affected SSM On-Prem host.

This vulnerability is due to the unintentional exposure of an internal service. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by sending a crafted request to the API of the exposed service. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to execute commands on the underlying opera

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20160.

title: A vulnerability in the web interface of Cisco Smart Software Manager On-Prem (SSM On-Prem) could...
description:
A vulnerability in the web interface of Cisco Smart Software Manager On-Prem (SSM On-Prem) could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to elevate privileges on an affected system.

This vulnerability is due to the improper transmission of sensitive user information. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by sending a crafted message to an affected Cisco SSM On-Prem host and retrieving session credentials from subsequent status messages. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to el

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated, remote attacker to elevate privileges, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or system compromise. This could severely impact the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of affected systems.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update from Cisco addressing CVE-2026-20151 immediately.
Restrict access to the Cisco SSM On-Prem web interface to trusted IPs and implement network segmentation to limit exposure.
Monitor system logs for unusual activity or unauthorized access attempts and enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users.

title: An issue was discovered in Mbed TLS through 3.6.5 and TF-PSA-Crypto 1.0.0. A buffer overflow can...
description: An issue was discovered in Mbed TLS through 3.6.5 and TF-PSA-Crypto 1.0.0. A buffer overflow can occur in public key export for FFDH keys.

title: An issue was discovered in DedeCMS 5.7.118 allowing attackers to execute code via crafted setup...
description: An issue was discovered in DedeCMS 5.7.118 allowing attackers to execute code via crafted setup tag values in a module upload.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in DedeCMS 5.7.118 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code by exploiting crafted setup tag values during module uploads. This could lead to full system compromise, data breaches, or service disruptions.
recommended_actions: Immediately update DedeCMS to the latest patched version if available, or apply any security patches provided by the vendor.
Restrict access to the module upload functionality to trusted users and implement input validation to mitigate exploitation.
Monitor logs for suspicious activity related to module uploads and consider deploying a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious payloads.

title: A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco IMC could allow an authenticated,...
description: A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco IMC could allow an authenticated, remote attacker with admin-level privileges to execute arbitrary code as the root user. This vulnerability is due to improper validation of user-supplied input to the web-based management interface. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by sending crafted HTTP requests to an affected device. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to execute arbitrary code on the underlying operatin

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated attacker with admin-level privileges to execute arbitrary code as the root user, potentially leading to full system compromise, data breaches, or further lateral movement within the network.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches or updates provided by Cisco to address CVE-2026-20097.
Restrict access to the web-based management interface to trusted networks and users only.
Implement monitoring and logging of HTTP requests to detect and respond to suspicious activity targeting the management interface.

title: A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco IMC could allow an authenticated,...
description:
A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco IMC could allow an authenticated, remote attacker with administrative privileges to conduct a stored XSS attack against a user of the interface.

This vulnerability is due to insufficient validation of user input. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by persuading a user of an affected interface to click a crafted link. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to execute arbitrary script code in the browser of the target

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated attacker with administrative privileges to execute arbitrary script code in the browser of a target user via a stored XSS attack. This could lead to session hijacking, data theft, or further exploitation of the system.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update from Cisco to address CVE-2026-20089.
Educate users about the risks of clicking on untrusted links, even within authenticated sessions.
Implement input validation and sanitization mechanisms to mitigate similar vulnerabilities in the future.

title: Exposure of sensitive information in the users MFA feature in Devolutions Server allows users...
description:
Exposure of sensitive information in the users MFA feature in Devolutions Server allows users with user management privileges to obtain other users OTP keys via an authenticated API request.



This issue affects Server: from 2026.1.6 through 2026.1.11.

description: There is an injection vulnerability in jeecg boot versions 3.0.0 to 3.5.3 due to lax character filtering, which allows attackers to execute arbitrary code on components through specially crafted HTTP requests.

title: CVE-2026-20668 - A logging issue was addressed with improved data redaction. This issue is fixed in iOS 18.7.7 and iP
description: A logging issue was addressed with improved data redaction. This issue is fixed in iOS 18.7.7 and iPadOS 18.7.7, iOS 26.3 and iPadOS 26.3, macOS Sequoia 15.7.5, macOS Sonoma 14.8.5, macOS Tahoe 26.3, visionOS 26.3. An app may be able to access sensitive user data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20668.

title: CVE-2026-20665 - This issue was addressed through improved state management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.4, iOS
description: This issue was addressed through improved state management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.4, iOS 18.7.7 and iPadOS 18.7.7, iOS 26.4 and iPadOS 26.4, macOS Tahoe 26.4, tvOS 26.4, visionOS 26.4, watchOS 26.4. Processing maliciously crafted web content may prevent Content Security Policy from being enforced.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows maliciously crafted web content to bypass Content Security Policy (CSP), potentially enabling attackers to execute unauthorized scripts or exfiltrate sensitive data. This could lead to data breaches, phishing attacks, or other malicious activities.
recommended_actions: Update all affected Apple devices and software (Safari, iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, visionOS, watchOS) to the latest patched versions immediately.
Implement additional web security measures, such as strict input validation and server-side CSP enforcement, to mitigate potential exploitation.
Monitor network traffic and web application logs for signs of suspicious activity or attempted exploitation of this vulnerability.

title: CVE-2026-4781 - A flaw has been found in SourceCodester Sales and Inventory System 1.0. The affected element is an u
description: A flaw has been found in SourceCodester Sales and Inventory System 1.0. The affected element is an unknown function of the file update_purchase.php of the component HTTP GET Parameter Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument sid can lead to sql injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been published and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4781.

description: A vulnerability was detected in SourceCodester Sales and Inventory System 1.0. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used.
